title: Bounded Recurrence And Invariant Checks

solver_reuse.pressure: The current rows are satisfiable finite trace, invariant, and threshold-reachability witnesses; they teach replay but do not yet contain an UNSAT safety certificate or benchmarkable contradiction.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote only after adding a bounded safety or invariant-refutation row with a source-linked QF_LRA/BV artifact; keep continuous-time existence, uniqueness, stability, chaos, and PDE theory in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode bounded recurrence traces as deterministic LRA/BV transition systems.
Replay safe invariant witnesses through Axeyum model evaluation.
Add UNSAT safety proofs only after the certificate route for bounded transition systems is explicit.
Keep continuous-time existence, uniqueness, stability, chaos, and PDE theory marked Lean-horizon.
